reasoning: The armor_chain_v00 sprite is composited onto the player character and placed in the transition zone between the dark-red dungeon tiles and the grey stone area. Locatability is good: the white/blue/gold color palette contrasts clearly against the dark dungeon background and the character can be spotted within 0.5s. Silhouette is clean and humanoid, distinct from the EchoBox item in the lower-left corner and from all other scene entities. The bright tones prevent dark-area blending issues. Pixel art style matches the game's Echoes aesthetic without appearing pasted. However, the chain mail texture detail on the armor is difficult to resolve at the scene's native scale — the fine chainlink pattern merges into a uniform light-blue/white tone, making the 'chain' identity of the armor unclear without zooming in. Color hue is distinct from background tiles and no tonal clash is observed. Overall a functional, readable sprite that just misses pass threshold due to loss of armor-type readability at distance.
